arms.flat: 45 candidates -> discovery ranking -> single maximum -> confirmation
arms.hierarchical: 12 families -> strongest family -> its representative (one-SE plateau, simplest member) -> confirmation
arms._paired: Both arms consume the same permutations so their results are paired, but each builds its own maximum distribution and its own p-value. There is no shared threshold.

cross_fitting.role_split: one confirmation fold held out, the rest discover; the confirmation fold rotates so each inner fold serves once as untouched validation
cross_fitting._independence: Rotations are NOT independent — their discovery sets overlap. The contract says 'at least 2 rotations' and claims nothing more.

acceptance.implementation: scripts/acceptance.py — imported by BOTH the real run and every permutation, so the test cannot measure a difference between two implementations
acceptance._rule: All clauses must hold simultaneously. Insufficient evidence returns nothing rather than the best of what was on offer.

statistic.T: max(score_j over eligible j), or 0.0 when nothing is eligible
statistic._equivalence: T > 0 is exactly the previous acceptance: min_median_confirmation_delta and complexity_penalty are the same 0.004, so no threshold moved when the rule was rewritten.
statistic._zero_is_a_result: T = 0 encodes 'the procedure accepted nothing', which is a valid and complete outcome, not a missing value.

acceptance._why_not_modal: The previous rule examined only the modal pick (Counter.most_common(1)). On NOW outer fold 0 two families were each chosen twice and the tie was broken by insertion order, handing the verdict to price_distance (positive in 1 of 2, median -0.0070) while volume had won both of its rotations with a median of +0.0298. Counter's ordering is not reproducible across Python versions, and a permutation cannot honestly reproduce 'whichever unit Counter returned first'.
acceptance._recount: Replaying the rule over the stored rotations changed exactly one decision: flat 14 unchanged, hierarchical 11 -> 12, scope unchanged at 16 outer folds. units_eligible = 1 in every acceptance.

stop_conditions.no_viable_model: if the model space cannot produce a learnable model for a window, that window reports no_viable_model and contributes nothing to feature evidence
stop_conditions.no_provisional_acceptance: if cross-fitting accepts nothing in either arm, the stage ends without the null
stop_conditions.null_rejects_all: the feature space fails the declared standard of proof; this is a result, not a failure

result._same_feature: both retained arms resolve to representative 112 on ORLY/1 — two discovery paths (flat, hierarchical family) to one feature; the funnel counts arms, so 2
result._evidence: flat 112: b=0/50 (p_mc=0.020); hierarchical oscillator_rsi: b=1/50 (p_mc=0.039) — both well inside alpha=0.10 at M=50. The 7 demoted all reached b=5 (futility). Clean partition; no unit within one MC standard deviation of the boundary.
result._finding: GOOG (+0.037) and NVR (+0.087) had POSITIVE tuned deltas yet were demoted (b=5, own-null) — tuning a block-permuted noise column matched the gain, so it was hyper-parameter-search overfitting, not the feature.
result._correction: Supersedes the pre-correction funnel 11->4. Rung 6 had been fed A1-only survivors (retained IDXX/2 208 and BKNG/0 volume, which A2/B rejected) and applied b<=4 (calibrated for M=50) at M=20 (admitting p=0.238). Corrected: fed A1∩A2∩B (9); threshold b<=floor(alpha*(M+1)-1) derived from alpha; own_null M raised 20->50 so the headline gate is no coarser than max_null (at M=20 the retain/demote boundary sat within one MC sd — a marginal unit's verdict was a function of the seed, e.g. ORLY/1 flat 112 flipped b=0<->2). Reproducible under PYTHONHASHSEED=0, jobs-independent.

rung_6_survivor_hpo.question: The ladder measures a feature's utility at hyper-parameters frozen on core. It does not measure the maximum utility of that feature under an optimally tuned core + feature.
rung_6_survivor_hpo.protocol: for each survivor of confirmation AND the null: tune core with a local budget B, tune core + survivor with the SAME budget B, tuning on discovery folds only, then compare on an untouched confirmation fold
rung_6_survivor_hpo._why_legitimate_here_and_not_earlier: Tuning on the superset co-adapts the parameters to features the baseline lacks and inflates every gain, which is why screening freezes core. Rung 6 relaxes that deliberately and only after the screening verdict exists, so the relaxation cannot manufacture a survivor — it can only measure how much more a confirmed one is worth.
rung_6_survivor_hpo._must_not: overturn a rung-5 rejection; if it could, the screening was pointless
rung_6_survivor_hpo.open_question: whether the hyper-parameter search reintroduces winner's curse and therefore needs its own null, and whether a confirmation fold reused from rungs 4-5 is still untouched
rung_6_survivor_hpo.phase: MAXIMUM OPTIMIZATION, after the FAST SCREENING phase closes

own_null.pass_condition: retain iff b <= floor(alpha*(permutations+1)-1); at M=20, alpha=0.10 -> b<=1 (p_mc<=2/21=0.095<=alpha)
own_null.alpha_binding: = max_null.alpha (0.10); one lab significance level. The b<=4 constant it replaced was calibrated for M=50 (5/51=0.098) and silently admitted p=5/21=0.238 at M=20. Phase B: contract_lint to enforce ==max_null.alpha.
own_null._upgrade: M 20→50: bramka headline nie może być rzadsza od max_null (M=50). Przy M=20 granica retain/demote (b≤1 vs b≥2) leży w zasięgu jednego odchylenia MC — werdykt jednostki marginalnej był funkcją ziarna (ORLY/1 flat 112: b=0↔b=2 z ziarnem), nie danych. M=50: alpha_eff 0.095→0.098 (bez zmiany poprzeczki), ostrość jak max_null. Legalne (rung_6 ∈ ADMISSIBLE).

rung_7_interactions.question: A feature can be weak alone and valuable in combination — with a regime, a direction, or another feature.
rung_7_interactions.scope: survivors only — O(S^2), not O(N^2). With the handful that survive Rung 5, the pair space is single digits, versus 990 for all 45 candidates.
rung_7_interactions.reuse: the subset evaluator (feature_search.eval_subset) and family machinery (golden.*) unchanged; the interaction gate is the confirmation/null discipline of Rungs 4-5 applied to pairs
rung_7_interactions.own_gate: a pair must beat both its own best single member AND its own permutation null, or it is not an interaction — only a coincidence of two singles
rung_7_interactions._precondition: at least two survivors to combine; on this panel Rung 6 retained 4, so the pair space exists but is tiny
